leadText: If you were looking for the location in Paldea, see Secluded Beach. Ula'ula Beach (Japanese: ウラウラビーチ ʻUlaʻula Beach), known as Secluded Shore (Japanese: ウラウラ裏海岸 ʻUlaʻula Secluded Shore) in Pokémon Sun and Moon, is a location on Ula'ula Island in Alola, located south of Route 12.

sections.title: Mantine Surf
sections.text: Mantine Surf [ edit | edit source ] The player can travel from this beach to other islands' Surf Spots using Mantine Surf if they have visited those locations. The player can travel to the following locations: Akala Surf Spot: Heahea Beach Poni Surf Spot: Poni Beach
